Our Intention

This project intends to help orphans, learners from poor backgrounds, and intelligent children access quality education which can help them survive in the poverty stricken district of Ibanda.

Donate Now

Our Intention

This project intends to help orphans, learners from poor backgrounds, and intelligent children access quality education which can help them survive in the poverty stricken district of Ibanda.

Donate Now

We are St. Andrew’s School Project for The Young

Registered in Ibanda District (Ibanda Town Council), Uganda as a Community Based Organisation (CBO) Number 529.

Readmore

PROJECT PERIOD

This school intends to run for many years and if possible to be present even in a hundred years to come , we would love this institute to remain benefiting the people of Ibanda even after we are no longer in this world.

TARGET POPULATION

This project aims at helping the children in the Ibanda to acquire quality education because most parents cannot afford to pay school fees even when their children are longing for education. Some children are orphans due to HIV/AIDs scourge.

PROJECT SUMMARY

This project intends to help orphans, learners from poor backgrounds, and intelligent children access quality education which can help them survive in the poverty stricken district of Ibanda.

Signup for our email newsletter to keep tabs on our activities.

We'll use this information only to send you our regular newsletter regarding the progress and activities at St. Andrew’s School Project For The Young.

  • 8687

    Can Unlock Our Dream

    Our assumption is that if 8687 people can donate 25+ Euros, the project would successfully be accomplished in shortest possible time. Donate here

  • 55000

    Euros Needed to Make a Difference

    Truly, money is a scarce and a rare commodity everywhere but by sacrificing a bottle of beer you would be contributing a lot to the welfare of African child.

  • 400

    Children to be helped

    We to accommodate over 400 children in the next 2-3 years and expand in future. The school will be gender sensitive and it will accommodate everyone regardless of religion, tribe, race.

  • 2022

    Year of Change

    St. Andrew’s School Project For The Young is a life changing project for the people of Ibanda and Africa that should be started by the end of 2016.
